title: The Legend of Nezha
synopsis: The Legend of Nezha narrative: The story of Nezha, the heavenly boy who was born bare, very mischievous, but the temperament, the mentality of goodness, always towards the righteous. With powerful martial arts and magic, he tried to bring peaceful life for the people in the time of raging evil.

title: Shouzen
synopsis: Douzen, a Taoist priest who travels the land, one day encounters a young girl raised by a yokai. Unfamiliar with human emotions or affection, Douzen gives her the name Shouzen and decides to take her along on his travels as his disciple. What is goodness? What is love? Thus begins a journey of spiritual training for Shouzen as she grows into a human being. (Source: Fuji TV, translated)

title: Sollotalchulgwi
synopsis: After serving his military duty, Junghoon, who has never had a girlfriend, returns to college. He has a secret crush on Eunji, a member of the school’s paranormal activity research club called Mysteria, in which he also belongs. One day, Junghoon meets Jisun, a virgin ghost, by chance, and Jisun asks him for help with her Scare tests, the exams that she needs to pass in order to be reborn. In return, Junghoon makes an arrangement with Jisun to help him score points with Eunji. While trying to help each other’s problems, the two run into disagreements, but their feelings for each other grow deeper as time passes. (Source: KMDb)

title: Kappa no Sanpei
synopsis: Sanpei is a lazy little 7 year old boy who rarely concentrates on anything beside eating his school dinners. Despite being constantly jeered at by his classmates for looking like a Kappa, Sanpei is a relatively happy go lucky boy that is quite content with living alone with his grandfather in the mountains. One day, Sanpei's school announces that it will hold a swimming gala with the top prize being an all expenses paid trip to the big city of Tokyo. Sanpei resolves to enter the contest so that he can have the chance to visit Tokyo and meet with his Mother who seems to have been working there for as long as he can remember. Unfortunately, Sanpei is not a very able swimmer and so decides to sneak off to a nearby lake to practice in secret. Sanpei quickly finds himself dragged under the water by a strong undercurrent and drowns only to find himself regain consciousness within the magical realm of the Kappa. Thus begins Sanpei's journey as he befriends one of the Kappa children, Gartaro,

title: Ningen Kaishuusha
synopsis: The story centers on a mysterious all-black waste collection truck that appears out of nowhere. However, instead of collecting garbage or discarded appliances for disposal, it picks up "useless" people. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Shanshen Yu Xiaozao
synopsis: Xiaozao is a girl who always brings misfortune to others. She has to move into a temple named God of Mountains Temple where lives a real god of mountains. As turmoil looms in the Martial World, and the Eight Wonders of the Evil Dragon unleashes dark forces, who will emerge as the new warrior legend? (Source: Netflix)
